name: openEuler Infrastructure SIG
description: The infrastructure team is responsible for system function development and maintenance of the openEuler community.

name: openEuler Infrastructure SIG Repository List
description: openEuler Infrastructure SIG maintains 17 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Infrastructure SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The infrastructure team is responsible for system function development and maintenance of the openEuler community.. The SIG has 19 core members and maintains 17 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler Infrastructure SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler Infrastructure SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at infra@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler Infrastructure SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Infrastructure SIG maintains 17 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/Infrastructure.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler Infrastructure SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Infrastructure SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: George.Cao, TommyLike, imjoey. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
